face.structure: oval-shaped, high cheekbones, slightly angular jawline

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a subtle upward tilt
details: sharp contrast between iris and sclera

skin.rendering_notes: soft, diffused lighting to accentuate cheekbones

hair.flow: loosely flowing with slight movement, hint of natural wave at the ends

character.aura: mysterious yet approachable, a balance between calm and curiosity

outfit.design: dark navy blazer over crisp white shirt
details: pleated plaid skirt in muted tones
outfit.fit: snug yet comfortable, emphasizing slender figure

composition.framing: medium shot focusing from the chest up
composition.pose: head slightly tilted to the right
composition.gesture: arms gently crossed, hands resting on elbows

background.color_palette: earthy tones, predominantly soft ivory and warm beige
background.details: blurred bookcases and a hint of natural light from a window
background.rules: background elements should remain soft-edged to maintain focus on the character
